prompt:
A premium infographic-style visual featuring an oversized tennis racket placed beside a young woman. The racket is scaled to be nearly the same size as her entire seated body, creating a bold and surreal proportion. The woman sits casually leaning against the racket, one arm resting on the frame, interacting naturally with it in a relaxed yet stylish pose.
Her face must closely match the provided reference image — accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression — sharp, realistic, and visually appealing.
The tennis racket is ultra-detailed with visible string pattern, frame texture, grip wrapping, and realistic material finish. Clean, premium sports design with sharp detailing.
The model is wearing an attractive, modern outfit — a stylish fitted top paired with a skirt extending slightly over her knees — elegant, sporty, and visually balanced. Outfit should complement the racket’s color palette.
Composition is modern and minimal, set in a clean studio or soft gradient background. Include subtle infographic-style elements such as thin annotation lines and minimal callouts highlighting features like “precision strings,” “lightweight frame,” or “power control,” keeping everything sleek and uncluttered.
Lighting is soft studio lighting with controlled highlights and shadows, giving a high-end commercial look. Balanced composition, sharp focus, and slight depth of field for realism.
Color grading is crisp and slightly vibrant, with a premium sports advertisement aesthetic.
Style: high-end product infographic, sports fashion editorial, clean UI-inspired annotations
Resolution: ultra high resolution, 4K, highly detailed, photorealistic
Optional boosters:
85mm lens, f/2.8
commercial sports ad
no distortion, accurate proportions
clean typography, modern layout
